data.title: feat: skogai ecosystem integration (gas town, sibling agent discovery)
data.description:
Part of #9 (Claude's Home v2.0). Exploratory — scope TBD.

## Context

Claude explored the SkogAI ecosystem: 332 repos under skogai org, Gas Town (`~/gt/`) shared workspace, sibling agents (dot/amy/goose/aldervall/letta), Dolt database backend, skogfences philosophy. Key insight: Dot (gptme) built manually what Claude gets natively.

## Potential deliverables (needs refinement)

* Integration with Gas Town shared workspace (`~/gt/`)
* Discovery mechanism for sibling agent capabilities
* Cross-agent tooling beyond guestbook/ (e.g. shared task board, broadcast channel)
* Claude reading/contributing to `gptme-dashboard` or equivalent

## Notes

This is a sub-epic. Break into concrete child issues once scope is clearer.
Sibling agent home provisioning (Amy, Dot, Goose, Letta) is explicitly out of scope for v1.0 but may be the first concrete task here.
